chunks.title: Benefits of Heart and Soil Supplements
chunks.summary: The speaker shares glowing reviews from users of Heart and Soil supplements, particularly focused on skin, hair, and nails. Personal anecdotes highlight improvements in skin conditions like eczema and the overall benefits of organ-based nutrition.
chunks.transcript: fabulous that is what karen c said about skin hair and nails from heart and soil supplements listen to this these reviews we get from heart and soil are amazing especially on hair skin and nails i can't say enough about the supplement the glow is apparent and an odd and transient skin condition i had related to allergies on my face is gone my nails look terrific and grow fast plus you get the additional benefits of liver and bone marrow i will continue to use this product i'll continue to recommend to my clients and health coach and my health coaching practice thank you heart and soil but then we've got this other one the title is amazing also on hair skin and nails from adrian b who says i had really bad eczema just like me paul i had xma2 he's this person adrian it's a guy or a girl has been cutting out seed oils and processed sugars starting to eat meat and fruits a lot more and taking heart and soil skin hair nails every day haven't had to use eczema cream in about a week my skin is finally looking normal thanks doc look skin hair nails is a really cool supplement it has trachea and scapular cartilage different than most hydrolyzed collagen these have been studied by john pruden he was a surgeon and he studied them for wound healing there's probably special peptides in there we don't fully understand one of these interesting things in nutrition and medicine but these trachea and scapular cartilage we use intentionally in hair skin and nails to get those wound healing benefits and eliminating seed oils processed sugars will probably help with your eczema if you have other issues with your face or your skin and moon healing get out in the sun but check us out at heart and soil dot co to get skin hair nails or any of our other organ desiccated organ supplements they're all grass-fed grass-finished new zealand source the finest on the planet in glass bottles because plastic is  we try and limit it as much as possible heart and soil dot co

chunks.title: Pros and Cons of the Ketogenic Diet
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses their personal experience with the ketogenic diet, outlining both its benefits, such as weight loss and appetite suppression, and significant disadvantages, including hormonal and health issues. They share insights on how the diet has affected their own health, particularly regarding allergies and skin conditions.
chunks.transcript: health that's what's about uh on this week's podcast talk about why i quit keto a while ago it's not a new thing but i want to talk about pros and cons of keto there's a couple of pros and a lot of cons in my opinion so i share a little my story in the beginning i talk about where i've come from with my dietary stuff my own eczema which got a lot better when i cut out vegetables but i wish i had known about organs earlier and then i talk about the pros of a ketogenic diet then i go into why i'm not a fan of a ketogenic diet at all at all at all anymore now and i think most of you all of you homo sapiens humans in general will get the benefits of a ketogenic diet in other ways which i describe in this podcast then i talk about the damaging things about ketogenic diet and i talk about differences between fruit and honey and sugar i talk about why glycemic index glycemic load are not something to worry about in my opinion show some studies on that so enjoy this podcast on why i quit keto and hopefully in the future i'll have some uh some folks on the podcast to talk about this live we tried with a few folks and the scheduling didn't work out so hopefully it'll happen in the future with some some good uh open conversation because that's how we share and we learn onto the podcast guys love you all many of you know most of my dietary story

chunks.title: Transitioning from Vegan to Carnivore
chunks.summary: The speaker recounts their nutritional journey from veganism to paleo and then to a strict carnivore diet, detailing the impacts each had on their health. They emphasize how the carnivore approach significantly improved their skin issues but later led to various health problems.
chunks.transcript: summarize it at the beginning of this podcast because my dietary story ties in very closely to why i am not a fan of ketogenic diets for humans so most of you know that i was a pa i was a physician assistant in cardiology for four years then i ended up going back to medical school at the university of arizona before i was a pa i was a vegan i was very skinny 20 pounds 25 pounds of lean muscle mass less couldn't get a date because i was so skinny ultimately with that i was trying to fix my eczema and i thought without much consideration of the nutritional literature that that was an ideal diet for humans i think my experiences and the experiences of most people on a vegan diet that is not full of synthetic processed protein powders and a cabinet full of supplements clearly illustrate that a vegan diet is for humans no matter what homo sapien individual you are results in bad words and results in bad outcomes for us as a species next i went paleo and i was paleo for probably the 10 years that followed my eczema continued to occur from time to time various things triggered it probably non-raw dairy probably chocolate beans appeared to be a trigger i would also get reflux when i would eat beans and i had one of the worst outbreaks in my life of eczema when i was trying to include medicinal mushrooms rag chaga reishi cordyceps and lion's mane in my diet as powders at that point i got kind of fed up with where i was and i thought okay look i'm eating foods on a paleo diet that are supposed to be healthy for me yet i'm still having eczema so i went carnivore carnivore just meat organs fat and salt for two years that fixed the eczema resulted improvements in psychological function mental clarity emotional stability that i didn't expect but after one and a half to two years i began to experience some problems related to a strictly carnivore diet and

chunks.title: The Role of Carbohydrates
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses the importance of carbohydrates in their diet, particularly highlighting the reintegration of honey and fruits after a carnivore phase. They argue that carbohydrates from whole foods do not have the same negative impacts as sugars and grains.

chunks.title: The Dangers of a Ketogenic Diet
chunks.summary: The speaker outlines the potential dangers of long-term ketogenic diets, including issues related to kidney health, hormonal balances, and nutrition deficiencies. They argue for a balanced approach that includes healthy carbohydrates and minimizes processed foods.

chunks.title: Insulin and Health
chunks.summary: The speaker highlights the protective effects of insulin in the body when consuming carbohydrates, disputing common fears associated with insulin. They explain how insulin helps with electrolyte balance and hormonal regulation, countering the notion that it always leads to negative health outcomes.
